title: For e-Tourist Visa
description:
Scanned Bio Page of the passport showing the Photograph and Details *
For short term courses, copy of letter from the institute/organization/hospital etc. concerned on its letter-head *
For voluntary work of short duration, copy of letter from the organization concerned on its letter-head *

title: For e-Business Visa
description:
Scanned Bio Page of the passport showing the Photograph and Details*.
Copy of Business Card.
Any letter of invitation if applicable from Indian parties which wish you conduct the business (optional).
For Sports Related Activity
Copy of Passport page containing personal particulars *.
Approval of the Government of India in the Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports (Department of Sports).
Invitation Letter to foreign sports teams and sports persons to visit India by the concerned Sports Federation/Association in India.
If the applicant had participated in any commercial sports event during his/her previous visit to India, then documents regarding Tax compliance for the said visit are to be furnished
If the sports event entails visit to Restricted or Protected Areas in India, below mentioned additional documents are also to be submitted
Clearance for holding the event from the Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India.
Political Clearance for holding the event from the Ministry of external Affairs, Government of India.
Requisite clearance from the Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports.
For e-Business Visa visiting “To deliver lecture/s under Global Initiative for Academic Networks (GIAN)”

Scanned Bio Page of the passport showing the Photograph and Details*
Invitation of the host institute to the foreign faculty
Copy of the sanction order under GIAN issued by the National Coordinating Institute viz. IIT Kharagpur
Copy of the synopsis of the courses to be taken up by the faculty

title: Documents Required for Company Setup in the UAE
description:
Passport copies of shareholders and managers (with photographs)
Proposed trade names
Attested copies of incorporation/registration certificates and MOA/AOA (for branch setup)
Original board resolution confirming financial commitment (for branch setup)
Passport copy + photo of the shareholder(s)

title: Documents Required
description: Passport (with 6 months validity)

title: Documents Required
description: Hotel booking confirmation

title: Documents Required
description:
Return flight
tickets

title: List of documents for single entry visa
description:
Passport copy (both sides)
 Photo (JPG format and white background with head spacing)
 Round trip flight ticket
 Hotel confirmation
 Bank statement

title: Mandatory documents required for multi-visit visa
description:
Passport with six months validation.
 3 months bank statement
 Verified itinerary with agency stamp
 Photo with white background
 Hotel confirmation/cruise confirmation
Flight confirmation
 Invitation letter and ID card

title: Fly and Cruise visa
description:
Passport and photo
 Flight ticket with cruise ticket and itinerary with verified stamp of the company
 Hotel and accommodation confirmation
 Bank statement (recent 3 months)
 Invitation letter and ID card of resident

title: Requirements for Tourist Visa
description:
Entry visa application form into the Kingdom of Morocco.
Two identity photographs in colour on white background (4 X 3 cm) showing the features of the face clearly.
Identity card or residence permit or any document that proves the address.
Valid passport: The validity of the passport or the travel document must be longer than the duration of stay.
A photocopy of the passport (pages indicating the identity & the validity).
6 Months Bank statement attested from the bank.
Original Covering letter from the applicant /profession details.

title: Requirements for Business Visa
description:
Entry visa application form into the Kingdom of Morocco.
2 identity photos in colour on a white background (4x3cm) showing the features of the face clearly.
Identity card or residence permit or any document showing current address.
Valid passport: The validity of the passport or the travel document must be longer than the duration of the stay.
A photocopy of the passport (pages indicating the identity and the validity).
Original Invitation letter from any Moroccan Company, the signature on the invitation should be legalized by local authorities in Morocco and attested by the bureau of legalization of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Morocco, or certified Apostille.

title: Below are the requirements for your South Korean Visa.
description:
Passport: Your passport must be valid for six months with three blank pages.
Visa Application Form: This form must be duly filled out and signed by the applicant.
Photographs: Two passport-sized colour photographs with a white background.
Cover Letter: This letter includes the reason for your visit.
Health Condition Form: Available at Visa Application Centre and Online.
Declaration Form: Available at Visa Application Centre and Online.
Bank Statement: Either original or stamped copy of the last six months.
Income Tax Returns:
1. Individual Income Tax Return (2 Years)
2.Business Personal ITR (3 Years), Company's ITR - 3 Years (Optional)
Flight Tickets: Show proof of your confirmed return tickets.
Proof of Accommodation: Show proof of your hotel reservation in South Korea.

title: Eligibility and Documents Required for UAE 5-year Tourist Visa
description:
Required Valid Hotel Bookings and Return Flight Tickets
The first visit must be made within 60 days after receiving the Approved Visa
Digital colour copy of your passport size photograph with white background
Scanned colour copy of first and last page of your valid Passport
Last 6 months Bank statements to prove your liquidity and sufficiency of funds- minimum 4000 USD
A letter from bank certifying balance in USD
Proof of health insurance Travel (minimum 1-year)
Reference of a person in UAE (name, contact details and address)

title: Documents required for Australia Tourist Visa
description:
Passport Copy – Front and back.
Recent Passport-Sized Photograph: Clear and recent.
Contact Number and Email ID
Parents' Details: Date of Birth (DOB) and Place of Birth (POB).
Travel Itinerary (Group name list if traveling with a group.)
Bank Statement: Last 6 months, original, sealed, and stamped.
Fixed Deposit Proof (Optional)
Mutual Fund Statement (Optional)
Income Tax Returns (ITR): Last 3 years.
Payslips: Last 3 months (if employed).
Property Deed: (Optional)
Provident Fund (PF) Statement: (Optional)

title: Documents for Indian Citizens: 30/60 Day Japan Tourist Visa
description:
Valid National Passport (with old passport, if any)
  Issued within the last 10 years.
  At least 6 months validity after the scheduled return.
  At least two blank pages.
  No handwritten passports or passports with observations on the       2 Passport-sized Photographsfront page (bio data).
  2 Passport-sized Photographs
  White background, matte finish, not older than 3 months (size   2 X 2 inches).
  1st picture pasted on the application.
  2nd picture clipped on the last page of the passport (stapled  or pinned pictures not accepted).
Visa Application Form
  Duly filled and signed by the applicant (signature as per passport).
  For minors: Signed twice by legal guardian, with applicable documents (custody proof, divorce papers, death certificate, etc.).
Personal Covering Letter
  Original letter with travel plans, addressed to “The Visa Officer, Embassy of Japan
  Include a copy of the covering letter if submitting  applications for family members.
Employment Letter
  Original on business letterhead, signed and stamped by HR or directorate.
  Mention position, duration of service, "No objection statement," trip dates, and purpose.
Day-to-Day Schedule Plan of Travel
  Flight Reservation: Include names of all travelers.
  Proof of Accommodation in Japan: Hotel reservation, package tour confirmation, or advance payment proof.
Covid Vaccination Certificate
  Financial Documents
     If employed:
         Last 6 months personal bank statements (stamped and signed, not older than 7 days).
         Personal ITR for the last 2 assessment years (Acknowledgement page copy).
     If self-employed/company owner:
         Business registration certificate / GST Registration / Partnership Deed / Proof of ownership.
         Last 6 months personal and business bank statements (stamped and signed).
         Company and personal ITR for the last 2 assessment years (Acknowledgement page copy).
     If retired:
         Personal pension bank statement for the last 6 months (stamped and signed, not older than 7 days).
         Retirement proof.
         Proof of regular income from property or business   ownership.
     If student/unemployed:
         Parents/legal guardians' personal bank statements for the last 6 months.
         Personal ITR for the last 2 assessment years (ITR-V or Acknowledgement).
         Confirmation letter of financial support and a copy of parents/legal guardians' passports.

title: Documents Required for Egypt Tourist Visa for Indians
description:
Original Passport valid at least for 6 months
Photocopy of the first and last page of the Passport having the details of the applicant
Duly filled Visa Form
(2) Passport size colored photographs on white background with 60% face size
Request letter from the applicant specifying the purpose of visit along with passport detail
Detailed tour program (Travel Itinerary) with all contact details of the Egyptian Travel Agent on the letter head with the authorized signature and stamp of the Egyptian travel agent
Egypt Travel Agent National ID copy
Confirmed return complete-route Air ticket
Confirmed Hotel Booking/Accommodation Voucher
Last 6 months personal bank statement of the applicant with original signature and stamp of the Bank

title: Documents Required for Egypt Business Visa for Indians
description:
Original Passport valid at least for 6 months
Photocopy of the first and last page of the Passport having the details of the applicant
Duly filled Visa Form
2 Passport size-colored photographs on white background with 60% face size
Request letter from the applicant specifying the purpose of visit along with passport detail
Invitation letter from an Egypt-based entity with full address and contact details of the host
ID copy of the Invitee
Confirmed return complete-route Air ticket
Last 6 months personal bank statement of the applicant with original signature and stamp of the Bank

title: Documents Required for Egypt Entry Visa for Indian Citizens
description:
Original Passport valid at least for 6 months
Photocopy of the first and last page of the Passport having the details of the applicant
Duly filled Visa Form
2 Passport size colored photographs on white background with 60% face size
Request letter from the applicant specifying the purpose of visit along with passport detail
Invitation letter from an Egypt-based host with proof of relationship with the invitee
Residence permit for work of the host (if foreigner) with at least 6 months validity
Confirmed return complete-route Air ticket
Last 6 months personal bank statement of the applicant with original signature and stamp of the Bank

title: Documents Required
description:
A scanned colour copy of the first and last page of your valid Passport
Scanned colour copy of the confirmed return air ticket
Scanned colour copy of the hotel booking confirmation
